milestones.name: Data Pipeline v1
milestones.tester_condition: YouTube video IDs must be verified before DB seed

milestones.name: MVP Launch Ready
milestones.note: Deployed to https://seeneyu.vercel.app — DB seeded, all env vars set

milestones.name: Auth System
milestones.tester_condition: Learner can sign up, sign in, sign out. Admin routes return 401 for non-admins.

milestones.name: Marketing Materials
milestones.tester_condition: Pitch deck covers all 14 slides. One-pager fits one page. All P0 deliverables saved to .shared/outputs/marketer/.

milestones.name: Admin CMS
open_bugs: BUG-001 (medium): ClipForm score fields allow 1-10, model expects 1-3 — non-blocking
milestones.tester_condition: Admin can add/edit/delete clips from UI. Admin can view all learners and manage roles. Non-admin cannot access /admin.

milestones.name: Script-Aware Coaching Loop
milestones.tester_condition: Submit for AI Feedback works end-to-end. Record page shows character banner and script panel. Feedback page shows numbered action steps. AI prompt references character and script context.
deliverables: prisma/schema.prisma — add script field to Clip
src/app/api/sessions/[id]/feedback/route.ts — enhanced prompt + steps + fix no-frames bug
prisma/seed.ts — script text added to all 15 clips

milestones.name: Observation Guide — Pre-Practice Clip Analysis
milestones.tester_condition: Before recording, learner sees a structured analysis of how the clip scene was conducted: techniques used, timestamps, why each works. Observation guide renders on the clip detail page before the learner clicks Record.
deliverables: prisma/schema.prisma — add observationGuide JSON field to Clip

milestones.name: Micro-Practice Steps — Duolingo-Style Chunked Learning
milestones.tester_condition: Practice is split into 3-5 micro-steps. Each step shows what to focus on, has a max 30s recording, gets instant AI feedback on just that skill element. Completing all steps unlocks Full Performance challenge. Short recordings (≤30s) always produce at least 1 frame for AI analysis.
deliverables: src/components/MicroPracticeFlow.tsx — stepper UI with progress bar
src/components/MicroRecorder.tsx — 30s max recorder with instant feedback
src/app/library/[clipId]/record/RecordClient.tsx — enforce 30s max + Whisper audio for vocal clips

milestones.name: Onboarding Assessment & Personalized Learning Path
milestones.tester_condition: New user completes a 5-skill screening quiz on signup. AI scores their baseline. System generates a recommended learning path (ordered clip sequence per skill level). Learning path shown on dashboard. Progress tracked level by level.
deliverables: src/app/dashboard/page.tsx — personalized learning path + skill level progress
src/components/SkillProgressBar.tsx — level progression per skill category

milestones.name: Content Expansion — 100+ Lessons from Screenplay Films
milestones.tester_condition: Library has 100+ verified clips from films with public screenplays. Each clip has screenplay_source URL, script excerpt, observation_guide, and practice_steps. Library filter by film works. DB seed runs clean.
deliverables: prisma/schema.prisma — add screenplaySource field to Clip
prisma/seed.ts — updated to seed all 100+ clips
src/app/library/page.tsx — expanded filters (by film, screenplay status)

milestones.name: Performing Foundation Section
milestones.tester_condition: Foundation section at /foundation. 3 courses (Voice, Verbal, Body Language), 10+ lessons each. Each lesson: theory text, 2+ YouTube examples, 3-5 question quiz. Progress persists per user. Separate from the practice/library section.
deliverables: prisma/schema.prisma — FoundationCourse, FoundationLesson, LessonExample, QuizQuestion, FoundationProgress models
